history.description: Rd 2, but first game of tournament after many Nigerians flew in late on Day 1.
Exciting game against a promosing talent from the next generation of Thai wunderkinds!
My first match with an up-and-coming Thai talent
The game of the three REGINAE - remarkably, not in the top 3 of worst games of the day
Round 16 of Causeway at board 10 against super-saiyan LKB
My first time playing the Hong Kong giant, in round 17 - a true gentleman of the game. Streets will never forget the chicken leg challenge
Round 18 at Causeway 2026, 8th round of day 2 - also possibly the low point of my 20-year Scrabble career
Round 19 of Causeway against another Scrabble lesson. Unfortunately, also the low point of my 20-year Scrabble career
What would prove to be the last game of my tournament
